docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, ROBERT $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,670.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-29-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN--VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE AND GEN NASHIMOTO--QUALITY ASSURANCE DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2015 - JUDGMENT.
